query:
insert into TestRunStatementCoverage (
                        last_collect_nr,
                        product_id,
                        test_run_name,
                        test_run_date,
                        stmnt_filepath,
                        stmnt_file_hash,
                        stmnt_line,
                        hits
                    )
                    values (
                        $1,
                        $2,
                        $3,
                        $4,
                        $5,
                        $6,
                        $7,
                        $8
                    )
                    on conflict (
                        product_id,
                        test_run_name,
                        test_run_date,
                        stmnt_filepath,
                        stmnt_line
                    )
                    do update set
                        last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                        hits = excluded.hits
